_comment: Project Update Deck template v1. Based on project_update_deck.pptx design: 5 slides for recurring status updates. Draws from project_plan.md, gantt_tasks.csv, and update.md (if present). Same Aptos font / {company} design system as the intro deck.

meta.description: Recurring project status update deck. 5 slides. Use for weekly / milestone update meetings.

slides.name: Title
slides.title: {project_name}
slides.subtitle: Project Update
slides.speaker_notes: State the project name, update number or date, and who is presenting.

slides.name: Executive Summary
slides.title: Executive Summary
slides.speaker_notes: Lead with overall project status (On track / At risk / Delayed). Cover what was done since last update, what is planned next, and any key decisions made.

slides.name: Milestone Progress
slides.title: Milestone Progress
slides.speaker_notes: Walk through each milestone. Flag any that have slipped and explain the recovery plan.

slides.name: Risks and Issues
slides.title: Risks and Issues
slides.speaker_notes: Focus on new or escalated risks since the last update. Note any risks that have been resolved.

slides.name: Open Decisions
slides.title: Open Decisions and Confirmations Needed

content_source.section: 20. Open questions before final Gantt chart

slides.speaker_notes: These are blockers. Assign an owner and a deadline for each before leaving the meeting.
